message:
feat(ru): add DCG integration REST API endpoints

Add new endpoints for DCG-RU safety integration:
- POST /ru/plans/:id/validate - Validate plan against DCG
- POST /ru/sweeps/:id/validate - Validate all session plans
- POST /ru/plans/:id/create-exceptions - Create pending exceptions
- GET /ru/sweeps/:id/dcg-summary - Get DCG safety summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
